title: paspalum orbiculare
intro: Paspalum orbiculare, also known as dichotomy or Buffalo Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. The medicinal properties of Paspalum orbiculare include its ability to act as a diuretic, helping to reduce swelling and alleviate urinary issues. The health benefits of consuming Paspalum orbiculare include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and providing relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or decoction for medicinal purposes, and its leaves can also be dried and used as a herbal supplement.
